LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED WITH 30 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND THE ANSWER. (CCP 438(H)(2).) DEFENDANT EVA IRAHETA HAS LEAVE TO AMEND THE ANSWER, IF SHE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO PLEAD FACTS DEMONSTRATING A STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS OR WAIVER AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/HK

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. DEFENDANT INFORMS THE COURT THAT SHE IS SEEKING COUNSEL AND NEEDS ADDITIONAL TIME TO FILE AN OPPOSITION. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO MAY 8, 2017, AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302. DEFENDANTS MAY FILE AN OPPOSITION BY APRIL 24, 2017, AND PLAINTIFFS MAY FILE THEIR REPLY BY MAY 1, 2017. IF THE OPPOSITION IS NOT FILED, THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT SHALL PREPARE THE WRITTEN ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2017 Continued To Aug-16-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Noticeof Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATY. DAVID MARCOLINI, TEL. NO. 1-415-568-0742 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union's motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted with 30 days leave to amend the answer. (CCP 438(h)(2).) Defendant Eva Iraheta has leave to amend the answer, if she can do so in good faith, to plead facts demonstrating a statute of limitations or waiver affirmative defense to plaintiff's claims. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk

Noticeof Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Continued To May-11-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on thie matter. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to May 11, 2017. Ms. Vivian Learchy to give notice to defendant of the new hearing date. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk

Noticeof Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Continued To May-08-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Eva Iraheta, in pro per, Tel. 415.966.5757, for defendants;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. Defendant informs the Court that she is seeking counsel and needs additional time to file an opposition. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to May 8, 2017, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. Defendants may file an opposition by April 24, 2017, and plaintiffs may file their reply by May 1, 2017. If the opposition is not filed, the motion will be granted. The Court shall prepare the written order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
